description_long: This sculpture features four detailed busts of men, each with distinct facial features and attire, arranged closely together in a semi-relief style. The figures are rendered with expressive faces and period clothing, suggesting a commemorative or historical theme. The surface texture is rough and weathered, with visible chipping and erosion at the edges, giving it an aged appearance. The coloration is predominantly a mottled brownish-white, resembling weathered stone or cast bronze with patina. The figures are tightly grouped, with overlapping shoulders and heads, creating a sense of unity and collective presence. The back and sides of the sculpture are less detailed, focusing attention on the front-facing busts.
description: A weathered, rough-textured sculpture of four closely grouped male busts in period attire, rendered in mottled brownish-white material.
description_view_0: The front view shows all four busts clearly, with detailed facial features and clothing, highlighting the expressive faces and group arrangement.
description_view_1: The left-side view emphasizes the profiles of the two leftmost figures, with the others partially obscured and the depth of the relief more apparent.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the backs of the heads and shoulders, with minimal detail and a rough, unfinished surface.
description_view_3: The right-side view shows the profiles of the two rightmost figures, with the others receding and the sculpture's thickness visible.
attribute_subject_matter: group of four male busts in period attire
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
